title: Varied Pumpkins (evanandkatelyn edition)
description: This resource pack adds Evan and Katelyn's pumpkins into Minecraft
body:
This resource pack adds Evan and Katelyn's pumpkins into Minecraft. It features Francis, Bean, Meatball, Chunk, Sprout, and Charlie. Pumpkin will bhe chosen at random. 

NOTE: This should work for all Minecraft versions, but it was only tested by one user (us) so far. Optifine should not be required to use it.
